name: HyPhy
description: Hypothesis Testing using Phylogenies. A high-performance framework for building and testing stochastic evolutionary models.

powers.name: LIMITLESS_CUSTOMIZATION
powers.desc: Allows researchers to define any evolutionary model via its rich scripting language.

powers.name: PARALLEL_PROCESSING
powers.desc: Optimized for clusters, tearing through massive sequence alignments with MPI support.

name: Datamonkey.org
description: The public web-interface for the world's most advanced evolutionary models.

powers.name: ZERO_INSTALL
powers.desc: Run state-of-the-art HyPhy models directly in your browser without touching a terminal.

powers.name: GRID_INVOCATION
powers.desc: Offloads complex computations to high-performance clusters automatically.

name: HIV-TRACE
description: Transmission Cluster Engine. Maps the hidden connections in molecular epidemiology.

powers.name: CLUSTER_MAPPING
powers.desc: Identifies transmission chains from viral sequence data in minutes.

powers.name: SECURE_SURVEILLANCE
powers.desc: Built for public health departments to monitor outbreaks while protecting data privacy.

name: phylotree.js
description: A modular JavaScript library for interactive phylogenetic tree visualization.

powers.name: INTERACTIVE_MORPHING
powers.desc: Allows users to manipulate, prune, and annotate trees dynamically in real-time.

powers.name: MIDDLEWARE_INTEGRATION
powers.desc: Seamlessly plugs into larger web applications as a modular visualization core.

name: tn93
description: High-speed C++ implementation for calculating Tamura-Nei 93 genetic distances.

powers.name: INSTANT_METRIC
powers.desc: Calculates pairwise distances between thousands of sequences in the blink of an eye.

powers.name: STREAMING_COMPUTE
powers.desc: Designed to handle massive data streams with minimal memory overhead.
